name: BTX Start Platform Treasury
balance_source: Pending first-party BTX Start backend and wallet index
use_of_funds: Each payout address receives a 7-day 0.00% platform-fee trial. After that, the target platform fee is 0.50% and is intended to fund BTX Start infrastructure, security, miner tooling, and collectively selected new BTX projects.
notice: Treasury spending does not create miner ownership, dividends, or profit-sharing claims.
